data.name: cbbBeepStatus.Items2
data.value: Beep after a tag is identified

data.name: label14.Text
data.value: 2.If this function is not supported by tags, please turn it off.

data.name: label11.Text
data.value: Note: 1.Only a certain number of Impinj Monza tag types support this function.

data.name: label7.Text
data.value: 2.Reader stops tag operation if return loss is above the threshold.

data.name: label6.Text
data.value: 3.User can turn it off by setting the threshold to 0.

data.name: label5.Text
data.value: Note: 1.Reader detects antenna connections by measuring the return loss of RF ports.

data.name: label164.Text
data.value: (2) The old Neport interface cannot be searched for the moment.

data.name: label165.Text
data.value: (1) If you need to configure Client, please use a private network tool
